d: The master guide (+1000 lines) to mastering storage in Linux. Leave static partitions behind and learn to manage space like a fluid. Software RAID (mdadm), Logical Volumes (LVM), Snapshots, Thin Provisioning, and disaster recovery.
p: Arborito Library (EN) / Engineering & Technology / Information Technology: Operating Systems / Linux Ecosystem / Advanced Linux SysAdmin / Module 1: Advanced System Control / 03 Disks LVM RAID

d: The master guide (+1000 lines). Discover the power of Copy-on-Write (CoW), data self-healing, atomic snapshots, transparent compression, and integrated volume management.
p: Arborito Library (EN) / Engineering & Technology / Information Technology: Operating Systems / Linux Ecosystem / Advanced Linux SysAdmin / Module 1: Advanced System Control / 04 Advanced Filesystems
